author: Jdthomas24
description: Advanced Hubitat battery monitoring with analytics, trends and replacement tracking. Recurring scan schedule, confidence-weighted health, EWMA smoothing.
releaseNotes: v2.5.26 - New: Ignored Devices — exclude spare or storage devices completely from all reports, notifications, stale checks, health scoring, and the web portal. Removing a device from the list resets its history and logs a Restored entry. App Guide trimmed and updated.
